articles.author: Kelly Tyko
articles.title: Trump's name is headed to dollar bills as cash use continues to decline - Axios
articles.description: President Trump's signature is set to appear on U.S. currency — a first for a sitting president — just as Americans are using cash less than ever.
articles.content:
Driving the news: The Treasury Department plans to put Trump's signature on all new U.S. paper currency, tied to the nation's 250th anniversary in 2026.
